  (1:0-8) var t = x =>            <--    (1:0-8) var t = func
          ^^^^^^^^                               ^^^^^^^^

    (1:8) t = x =>                <--      (1:8) t = funct
              ^                                      ^

    (1:4) var t = x               <--     (1:17) ion t(x) 
              ^                                      ^

    (1:5) ar t = x                <--     (1:18) on t(x) {
              ^                                      ^

    (1:8) t = x =>                <--     (1:19) n t(x) {
              ^                                      ^

    (1:9)  = x => x               <--     (1:20)  t(x) {
              ^                                      ^

    (1:9)  = x => x               <--      (2:2)   retur
              ^                                    ^

(1:13-18)  => x * x;              <--   (2:9-14) urn x * x;
              ^^^^^                                  ^^^^^

   (1:18)  * x;                   <--     (2:14)  * x;
              ^                                      ^
